mapper.sql: id, task_id, order_no, table_name, target_table, status, retry_count, error_msg, migrate_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_data_migration_record ( task_id, order_no, table_name, target_table, status, retry_count, error_msg, migrate_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{orderNo}, #{tableName}, #{targetTable}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{errorMsg}, #{migrateTime}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), target_table = VALUES(target_table), retry_count = retry_count + 1, error_msg = VALUES(error_msg), migrate_time = VALUES(migrate_time), update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO t_data_migration_record ( task_id, order_no, table_name, target_table, status, retry_count, error_msg, migrate_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{record.taskId}, #{record.orderNo}, #{record.tableName}, #{record.targetTable}, #{record.status}, #{record.retryCount}, #{record.errorMsg}, #{record.migrateTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_data_migration_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT FROM t_data_migration_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_data_migration_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_data_migration_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 2
mapper.update: UPDATE t_data_migration_record SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_data_migration_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND table_name = #{tableName}
